MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON NOV-07-2012 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER ALISHA LIONS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: CYNTHIA M. LEE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF NOV-29-2012 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF PUBLICATION ON FILE NOR APPEARANCE. PETITIONER'S APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF FEES DENIED ON 11/7/2012. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: SONIA WONG, CSR#11288. (514)
FEES NOT PAID. PETITION OF ALISHA LIONS FILED ON 9/28/12 IS STRICKEN. NOTICE SENT TO PARTIES. (206)
